message:
Add floating-point epsilon guard and comprehensive tests for LeakyBucket

The leaky bucket rate limiter had a subtle bug where nanosecond timing
gaps between calls could cause tiny leaks, making a full bucket appear
to have room for one more request. This manifested as occasional
off-by-one rate limit violations under high concurrency.

- Add LEVEL_EPSILON (1e-6) constant for float comparison tolerance
- Apply epsilon guard to try_acquire(), time_until_room(), and state()
- Add 14 new tests covering: from_window construction, rejection when
  full, remaining count tracking, state reporting (empty/full/partial),
  time_until_room accuracy, reset behavior, and concurrent fill

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
